era_context: Late Bronze Age, New Kingdom Egypt (Ahmose I), Kassite Babylonia, Hittite Old Kingdom, Minoan Crete, early Mycenaean Greece. This is the era of the establishment of the New Kingdom and the consolidation of regional powers in the Near East.
geographic_coverage_gaps: Most regions outside the Near East and Eastern Mediterranean
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified for events listed (no events listed).
historiographic_note: 1609 BCE is not documented in surviving historical sources with year-specific precision. The era is known, but individual years are not distinguished in the historical record. This is expected for the mid-second millennium BCE outside of Egypt and the Hittite sphere.
